exhibits.name: Financial Statements

sub_exhibits.name: Audited Consolidated Financial Statements of Hyatt Hotels Corporation
sub_exhibits.notes: FY2024, 2023, 2022. Auditor: Deloitte & Touche LLP. Clean opinion.

exhibits.notes: Includes Guarantee of Performance (page 105-106). Parent company statements, not franchisor entity.

exhibits.name: Franchise Application
exhibits.notes: Online application portal. $75,000 new development or $150,000 change of ownership.

sub_exhibits.name: Exhibit G (Letter of Intent re Transfer)

exhibits.name: State Administrators / Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state franchise administrators and registered agents.

exhibits.name: System Standards Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: System Standards comprise 3,615 pages. Only TOC included in FDD.

exhibits.name: Confidentiality Agreement
exhibits.notes: Must be signed during evaluation process before receiving Confidential Information. 5-year term; indefinite for trade secrets.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 109 franchised Brand Hotels as of December 31, 2024 with addresses and telephone numbers.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees Who Left the System
exhibits.notes: Franchisees with outlet terminated, canceled, transferred, not renewed, or voluntarily/involuntarily ceased during most recent fiscal year.

exhibits.name: Central Hotel Services by Hyatt Master Agreement
exhibits.notes: Master agreement for field marketing, revenue management, central sales, GPGS, digital ancillary services. Contains schedules for each program.

exhibits.name: Comfort Letter
exhibits.notes: Required from each lender, ground lessor, and other parties with interest in Hotel real property.

exhibits.name: State-Specific Additional Disclosures and Riders
exhibits.notes: Riders to FA and Confidentiality Agreement for MD, MN, ND. California includes franchisor entity unaudited balance sheet.
